headline: Kimberly-Clark: This 5% Yielder Is A Buy Ahead Of The Kenvue Merger
summary: Upgrading Kimberly-Clark to a 'Buy' rating ahead of the Kenvue merger: cost synergies, stronger bargaining power, 5%+ yield and 53-year dividend streak. Read the full analysis here.
